ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., truck, car, motorcycle) */,
  "vehicle_number" TEXT /* Unique identification number for the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., active, maintenance, out of service) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the location belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was recorded */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle at the recorded location */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction the vehicle is heading (e.g., north, south, east, west) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the location data (e.g., in meters) */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the tracking device */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_locations_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "license_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the driver's license */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the driver was hired */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the driver (e.g., active, on leave, terminated) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Driver's performance rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being assigned */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver being assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was made */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the assignment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the assignment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., active, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_assignments_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_assignments_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., driver, dispatcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dispatchers" (
  "dispatcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dispatcher */,
  "dispatcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the dispatcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the dispatcher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the dispatcher */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the dispatcher was hired */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the dispatcher (e.g., active, on leave, terminated) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Dispatcher's performance rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dispatcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle involved in the communication */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver involved in the communication */,
  "dispatcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dispatcher involved in the communication */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message sent during the communication */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the communication occurred */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., text, voice, video) */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the message (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_dispatcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("dispatcher_id") REFERENCES dispatchers ("dispatcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
